name: Taxpayer Absence from Audit Interviews

eligibility.description: Available to any taxpayer undergoing an IRS interview relating to tax determination or collection who has a qualified representative with a written power of attorney.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can authorize a representative (CPA, Attorney, Enrolled Agent) via Power of Attorney to handle IRS interviews, allowing the taxpayer to avoid attending the interview personally unless an administrative summons is issued.
